subject: Re: Application for Praktikum – Digitales After Sales Business (w/m/d)
body:
Dear Michael Karmann,

Thank you for your message and for taking the time to review my application.
I appreciate the update regarding the Praktikum – Digitales After Sales Business (w/m/d) role and the consideration you gave my profile.
I remain interested in AUDI AG and would be glad to be considered again for suitable future opportunities.

Kind regards,
Le Cuong Nguyen

events.summary: Audi declined the application submitted on March 27, 2026 for `Praktikum – Digitales After Sales Business (w/m/d)` and invited a future reapplication for other entry-level opportunities.
events.incoming_message: Dear Mr. Le Cuong Nguyen, Thank you very much for your application and the interest you have shown in our company. Your documents give us a good impression of your personal and professional qualifications. However, we were unfortunately unable to consider you for the current positions, as some applicants whose previous career path makes them a particularly good match for our requirement profiles. Should you decide to book one of our attractive offers again at a later date and are interested in entry-level opportunities, we would be pleased to receive another application from you. We thank you for your trust and hope that you will continue to have a positive relationship with Audi. We wish you every success in your search for a position that meets your expectations and all the best.
